ablations.decision: add labels and continue with weakvideo/residual-island family
ablations.name: rank47base reviewer
ablations.result: LOOCV RMSE 0.000139; rank corr 0.773; model predicted all rank47base candidates as weak/negative, but weakvideo rank67 was a small direct-positive surprise

bitbucket: committed to Bitbucket wisc in this package; final commit hash reported by Codex after push
environment: No anchors; GT used only for post-hoc scoring/evaluation labels
implementation: Generated rank47base balanced, multiview, and weakvideo no-anchor subpart candidates from current assignment and feature NPZs. The reviewer ranked 784 old+new candidates with 35 prior full-score labels, then direct-scored five diverse rank47base candidates. Only weakvideo rank67 was direct-positive; it then passed density_simple and valid p005_area delivery.
module_detail: M7 adds a weakvideo residual-island proposer on the rank47 base; M10 spends a small direct full-score budget using prior side-effect labels; M8 commits only four compatible tracklets; M12 validates density_simple and p005_area delivery.
next: Fold rank67 label into the reviewer, search compatible weakvideo residual islands around component 43/38, and test small combos only after direct or density signals.
pipeline_module: M7 candidate retrieval + M10 scheduler + M8 graph resolution + M12 delivery calibration
s3: blocked: `aws sts get-caller-identity` failed locally with "Unable to locate credentials"; artifacts remain under reports/vlincs_iterations/20260623_rank47base_weakvideo_rank67_p005_gain and local_runs/offline_no_anchor_split_probe_20260623/rank47base_subpart_reviewer_delivery/
summary: Weakvideo rank67 moves 4 MCAM04/MCAM08 tracklets from component 43 / gid 96000046 to component 38 / gid 96000041. Direct full improves to 0.662969 and canonical density_simple+p005_area improves from 0.665084/0.525797/0.537115 to 0.665145/0.525833/0.537128.
title: No-anchor rank47-base weakvideo rank67 p005 gain
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as current no-anchor best assignment and canonical p005 delivery zip

visual_cases.failure_reason: After rank47, component 43 still held a cross-camera residual island whose weakvideo evidence was closer to component 38, leaving the delivery output split across two forced global IDs.
visual_cases.improvement: The weakvideo proposer isolates only the four compatible tracklets, keeps the larger source component intact, and the canonical density_simple+p005_area delivery score improves.
visual_cases.summary: Four weakvideo tracklets move from component 43 / gid 96000046 to component 38 / gid 96000041 on top of the rank47 base.
visual_cases.title: Rank67 repairs a weakvideo MCAM04/MCAM08 residual island

visual_cases.failure_reason: Before rank47, component 4 retained a small island that shared the target global ID evidence with component 38.
visual_cases.improvement: Rank47 committed the two-tracklet island and established the rank47 base for this follow-up.
visual_cases.summary: Two MCAM04 tracklets moved from component 4 / gid 96000004 to component 38 / gid 96000041, becoming the previous canonical best.
visual_cases.title: Rank47 context: MCAM04 residual move

visual_cases.failure_reason: The graph still held a small high-similarity MCAM08 residual island after rank40.
visual_cases.improvement: The reviewer committed only that local residual island and improved both density_simple and p005_area.
visual_cases.summary: Two MCAM08 tracklets moved from component 27 / gid 96000029 to component 29 / gid 96000031.
visual_cases.title: Rank46 context: MCAM08 residual island

visual_cases.failure_reason: A high-internal-similarity pair remained in the source component despite delivery preferring the target component.
visual_cases.improvement: The multiview subpart repair committed only two compatible MCAM08 tracklets.
visual_cases.summary: Two MCAM08 tracklets moved from component 5 / gid 96000005 to component 35 / gid 96000038.
visual_cases.title: Rank40 context: tiny MCAM08 false-split island

visual_cases.failure_reason: Low/edge-quality MCAM04/MCAM08 fragments were left in a larger source component.
visual_cases.improvement: The subpart repair tested a small conflict-supported group instead of moving the full component.
visual_cases.summary: Three edge/border tracklets moved from component 27 / gid 96000029 to component 10 / gid 96000011.
visual_cases.title: Rank15 context: early false-split island

workflow_steps.action: freeze no-anchor base components and forced/provisional statuses
generate balanced, multiview, weakvideo residual island queues
rank candidates, de-duplicate stale families, choose five diverse rank47base direct scorers
commit only seq 3848/5154/5672/8475 to target gid 96000041
workflow_steps.input: source component 43, target component 38, four source tracklets
workflow_steps.output: assignment CSV with 13 total subpart_reassign rows

workflow_steps.action: apply density_simple and valid p005_area detection filter
write README, ppt HTML, spec, visual evidence
workflow_steps.output: reproducible gain package for Bitbucket wisc
